dict.string: InterestingNotch analyzes audio from your music app to draw a real-time waveform in the notch. Audio is processed locally and never leaves your Mac.
InterestingNotch uses your microphone to record voice notes directly from the notch.
InterestingNotch uses Bluetooth connection status to notify you when selected paired devices connect or disconnect.
InterestingNotch uses the camera only to display the live Mirror preview.
InterestingNotch uses your calendars to display upcoming events in the Calendar widget.
InterestingNotch uses your reminders to display scheduled reminders in the Calendar widget.
